home.featuresSubtitle: A comprehensive bundle of LaTeX classes and packages for demanding documents.

friends.subtitle: LaTeX packages that were formerly part of KOMA-Script or originated within the KOMA-Script ecosystem.
friends.spinOffsDescription: Former KOMA-Script packages now maintained as standalone projects.
friends.enhancements: Improvements and extensions of third-party packages
friends.enhancementsDescription: Packages that improve third-party packages. They become obsolete once their maintainers adopt the functionality.
friends.otherFriendsDescription: Additional packages by the KOMA-Script author with ties to the ecosystem.
